settings.text: Innovative Biotechnology Wielded for     Skincare Excellence.

settings.caption: Science Backed Innovation
settings.heading: SynerGenius™
settings.text:
The jewel of Yoé’s formulations is the SynerGenius™ complex, a proprietary blend of botanical and bioengineered actives that works to deeply hydrate, repair, and visibly revitalize skin. SynerGenius™ is Yoé's advanced encapsulation delivery system which transports stable, maximally potent ingredients in a gentle time-released manner.

The actives in SynerGenius™ range from the gold standards of skincare (vitamin C, hyaluronic acid, ceramides, panthenol) to less familiar ingredients, including calming chebula seed extract; anti-inflammatory diosmin; red algae, a potent antioxidant; Squalane an effective emollient, and a vegan epidermal growth factor that is biocompatible with the growth factors found naturally in skin.

In a nod to founder Hazel Guo’s Japanese heritage, the ingredients in SynerGenius™ are solubilized in mineral-rich rice water, a longstanding facet of Japanese beauty culture.

settings.caption: Caring solutions
settings.heading: Quality Ingredients
settings.text: The jewel of Yoé’s formulations is the SynerGenius™ complex, a proprietary blend of botanical and bioengineered actives that works to deeply hydrate, repair, and visibly revitalize skin. Key to SynerGenius™ is the use of a highly sophisticated process of advanced encapsulation delivery system, designed to enhance the stability and effectiveness of active ingredients to ensures stable, maximally potent ingredients in a gentle, time-released manner. The actives in SynerGenius™ range from the gold standards of skincare (vitamin C, hyaluronic acid, ceramides, panthenol) to less familiar ingredients, including calming chebula seed extract; anti-inflammatory diosmin; red algae, a potent antioxidant; Squalene an effective emollient, and a vegan epidermal growth factor that is biocompatible with the growth factors found naturally in skin. In a nod to founder Hazel Guo’s Japanese heritage, the ingredients in SynerGenius™ are solubilized in mineral-rich rice water, a longstanding facet of Japanese beauty culture.

settings.heading: Advanced Encapsulation Delivery System
settings.text: Yoé’s advanced pharmaceutical-grade encapsulation technology protects active ingredients from oxidation and degradation while allowing for precise, time-controlled delivery to the deepest layers of the epidermis. Gradually releasing active ingredients in a time-controlled manner provides continuous skin nourishment and maximizes the benefits of each ingredient resulting in more enduring and effective outcomes. Encasing active ingredients with a protective barrier minimizes contact with the epidermis thus reducing the likelihood of skin irritation.

settings.caption: Our Standard
settings.heading: Clean beauty
settings.text:
Yoé products are clinically and dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, vegan, gluten-free, and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The Ympossible Cream and the Ympossible Cream Light do not contain retinol and are safe for use by pregnant and breastfeeding mothers.

Our products are formulated without parabens, phthalates, petroleum, mineral oil, polyethylene glycol, paraffin, sodium laureth sulfate, talc, essential oils, palm oil, synthetic fragrances, artificial dyes, and known endocrine disruptors.

Currently there is no globally recognized standard for clean beauty, Yoé products either meet or exceed the most stringent dictates in the beauty industry today. Our formulas are Environmental Working Group (EWG) verified, Leaping Bunny certified, and comply with the rigorous ingredient standards set by GOOP, Sephora, and Credo Beauty.
